name: Vendor Data Processing Agreement Exists
description: Vendors that process personal data on behalf of the organization should have a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) in place
remediation: Execute a Data Processing Agreement with the vendor that covers data protection requirements per GDPR, CCPA, and other applicable regulations
remediation_steps: Request vendor's standard DPA or provide your template
Review DPA for required clauses (sub-processors, data security, breach notification)
Execute the DPA with appropriate signatories
Store DPA in contract management system
